title: Whats Asuka playing
wikitext:
[]: What's Asuka playing?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Mon Aug 16, 2021 4:03 am Is this the first time we see a game full-on? Is this her only game? That would be sad, but kind of explain the insane score. I have a hunch it's not real, but is there anything it halfway resembles or is derivative of? Closest thing I can think of is Qix, but I'm far from a game expert.

[]: Re: What's Asuka playing?             Quote Post by PSIWasHere » Mon Aug 16, 2021 4:38 am If I remember correctly, It's a Wonderswan console, though I recall it being a Wonderswan in 2.0, I don't know if it was changed in the latter movies.

[]: Re: What's Asuka playing?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Mon Aug 16, 2021 4:48 am PSIWasHere wrote: If I remember correctly, It's a Wonderswan console, though I recall it being a Wonderswan in 2.0, I don't know if it was changed in the latter movies.

[]: Re: What's Asuka playing?             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Aug 27, 2021 12:58 pm Learned the answer to your question today. The game is called Gunpey, named after Gunpei Yokoi, maker of the wonderswan, Metroid etc and sadly died in a car accident in 97 I think. Here is footage of the game. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kPRMzG26Siw

[]: Re: What's Asuka playing?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Sat Aug 28, 2021 12:41 pm hui43210 wrote: Learned the answer to your question today. The game is called Gunpey, named after Gunpei Yokoi, maker of the wonderswan, Metroid etc and sadly died in a car accident in 97 I think. Here is footage of the game. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kPRMzG26Siw

[]: Re: What's Asuka playing?             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Mon Aug 30, 2021 1:04 am Look at the level number she's up to when talking to Rei. It's level 999. The same number as the backdoor code for her Eva when injecting it with Angel blood.

[]: Re: What's Asuka playing?             Quote Post by Luigi shinji » Mon Aug 30, 2021 4:40 am I admit I'm stupid but it looked like tetris to me
